audit_items.proof_trace: The check at lines 346-348 (`if (availableAssetUsdValue < assetParams.minAuctionSizeUsd) revert AmountBelowMinAuctionSize(...)`) is applied to every asset in the loop before any auction-starting side-effect. The function is additionally restricted to `AUCTION_WORKER_ROLE`, making untrusted bypass impossible. `checkUpkeep` also pre-filters ineligible assets (line 261), and `performUpkeep` re-validates with a fresh oracle price, so the guard holds on all reachable paths.
